hasAttributes.name: queueItemId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: queueId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the queue that the item is assigned to.

hasAttributes.name: objectId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the activity, case, or article assigned to the queue.

hasAttributes.name: objectIdTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by objectId

hasAttributes.name: objectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Select the type of the queue item, such as activity, case, or appointment.

hasAttributes.name: title
hasAttributes.description: Shows the title or name that describes the queue record. This value is copied from the record that was assigned to the queue.

hasAttributes.name: enteredOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date the record was assigned to the queue.

hasAttributes.name: priority
hasAttributes.description: Priority of the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: state
hasAttributes.description: Status of the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: status
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: toRecipients
hasAttributes.description: Recipients listed on the To line of the message for email queue items.

hasAttributes.name: sender
hasAttributes.description: Sender who created the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: organizationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization with which the queue item is associated.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: workerIdModifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the queue item was last assigned to a user.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: workerId
hasAttributes.description: Shows who is working on the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: workerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by workerId

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the queue item.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Select the item's status.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether the queue record is active or inactive. Inactive queue records are read-only and can't be edited unless they are reactivated.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the queueitem.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

definitions.description: A specific item in a queue, such as a case record or an activity record.
